title: Refs as Mutable Values (Without Re-renders)
description: Store values that persist across renders but don't trigger updates.

slides.title: Beyond the DOM: Mutable Values 🔄
Example: Stopwatch with Ref
slides.content: Using a ref to store interval ID:

quizData.question: What happens when you change the `.current` property of a ref?

options.text: Nothing – the value is updated but no re-render occurs

quizData.explanation: Changing a ref's `.current` does not trigger a re-render; it's a mutable container.
